target_statement: Seriousum fully reimplements Cilium userspace/control-plane behavior in Rust, while retaining upstream eBPF C programs.

scope_inventory.summary: Track/crate inventory exists, but a complete frozen-release surface inventory is incomplete.

implementation_coverage.summary: Strong Rust coverage exists for core tracks, but remaining runtime exceptions prevent a full reimplementation claim.

behavioral_test_parity.summary: Workspace and component evidence exist, but the full unmodified upstream integration matrix is not yet proven green.

operational_parity.summary: Installation and deployment workflows are documented, but automated parity-grade operational validation is incomplete.

performance_parity.summary: Microbenchmark comparisons are published, but system-level startup/memory/CPU parity is still pending kind-capable CI.

production_soak_proof.summary: No parity-grade soak, chaos, or recovery proof has been published yet.
